◎简　　介  

　　ORION: THE MAN WHO WOULD BE KING tells the story of Jimmy Ellis, an unknown singer thrust into the spotlight as part of a scheme that had him masquerading as Elvis back from the grave. With a fictional identity torn from the pages of Gail Brewer Giorgio’s novel Orion, the backing of the legendary birthplace of rock ‘n’ roll, Sun Records, and a voice eerily similar to Presley’s,...
